source_title: 11 Filmmaking/01 Create Your Own Action Scenes

evidences.content: Welcome to chapter 11. Now that we understand how Unreal Engine works as a 欢迎来到第11章。现在我们了解了虚幻引擎的工作原理，作为 I want to put all of the pieces together and get you up and running and 我想把所有的部分整合起来，让你能够运行起来，并且 creating animations pre-compute all of the materials so that we can view everything 只需要预先计算所有的材质，以便我们可以查看所有的内容 in real time and that's what's happening here 实时查看，这就是正在发生的事情 So when you first open 所以当你第一次打开时 you'll see all this chaos of different particle effects and icons 你会看到各种粒子效果和图标的混乱 So the first thing we can do is just right-click inside of our 所以我们可以做的第一件事就是在我们的内部右击 viewport to start moving and panning our camera 视口开始移动和平移我们的相机 And when that's set 当设置好了 press the G key just to disable any of those icons and make our viewport a 按下G键，禁用任何图标，并使我们的视口 little bit clearer 更清晰一些 But if we want to preview our sequence right away 但是如果我们想立即预览我们的序列 have to do is press on this play button and this will play our timeline for our 按下播放按钮，这将播放我们的时间轴 final shot right here live in the viewport 在视口中实时播放最终镜头 And notice here every time 请注意，每次 we'll get a different physics simulation for our drones as they slam 我们将得到不同的物理模拟，因为无人机撞击 into the ground 到地面 Now let's press stop or the escape key to stop our 现在让我们按停止或逃逸键停止我们的 simulation and if we want to scrub through that timeline that we just saw 模拟，如果我们想要在刚才看到的时间轴上进行擦洗 go to your content browser 转到内容浏览器 Sometimes when you're first starting Unreal 有时当你刚开始使用虚幻引擎时 find this from hitting ctrl and space 通过按下ctrl和空格键找到它 but I like to dock this in my 但我喜欢将其停靠在我的 layout so there's always a content browser 布局中，所以总是有一个内容浏览器 And then press on level 然后点击关卡 sequence vanguard clash final 序列先锋冲突最终版 And if we press on this little camera icon in 如果我们点击这个小相机图标 this camera cuts track 这个摄像机切换轨道 now we can scrub through our scene and press play 现在我们可以在场景中擦洗并播放 to view our shot in sequencer 在序列器中查看我们的镜头 Now a really important thing to know here 现在一个非常重要的事情要知道 when using Unreal for visual effects is that you need to press on this 当使用虚幻引擎进行视觉效果时，你需要按下这个 little magnet icon 小磁铁图标 This enables snapping and this means that we're 这将启用对齐，这意味着我们 snapping our playhead 对齐我们的播放头 our time indicator here that I'm scrubbing 我正在擦洗的时间指示器 it's snapping it to a whole frame 它将其对齐到一个完整的帧 If I press on the plus key 如果我按加号键 inside of sequencer to zoom in on the timeline 在序列器中放大时间轴 otherwise you can drag on 否则你可以拖动 If I disable snapping 如果我禁用对齐 you'll see that I can actually drag 你会看到我实际上可以拖动 in between frames and even though this can look kind of cool in the 在帧之间，即使这看起来有点酷 viewport where it's super slow motion 视口中，它是超级慢动作 if we set up keyframes in 如果我们设置关键帧 between the whole frames 在整个帧之间 then it's going to mess up our renders 那么它会搞乱我们的渲染 speaking of renders 说到渲染 rendering is really 渲染非常 really easy in this 在这个中非常容易 All you have to do is press on this clapper board inside of 你所要做的就是按下这个拍板 sequencer and this will automatically add your sequencer as a job in 序列器，这将自动将您的序列器添加为一个作业 the movie render queue 电影渲染队列 All we have to do is 将为我们的项目创建一个快速时间电影文件 And all we 我们所要做的就是 have to do is press on render local 按下本地渲染 If this is your first time 如果这是你第一次 rendering out 渲染输出 you're going to have to wait for your shaders to 你需要等待你的着色器 compile one more time 再次编译 this is really annoying 这真的很烦人 only have to do it once and you'll never have to do it again 只需要做一次，就再也不必再做一次 And now we can see our render as it's going here 现在我们可以看到我们的渲染正在进行 end of the sequence 序列的末尾 it's going to take all of these single 它将会把所有这些单个的 frames and combine it into a quick time movie file 帧合并成一个快速时间电影文件 Now to view 现在查看 that we can click on different actors inside of our scene 在我们的场景中启用和禁用不同的演员 And that's exactly what I've done with our effects level 这正是我在我们的效果级别上所做的 Now think of levels as just a group of different 现在把级别看作是一组不同的 actors
